Carlos Flores Komatsu
  • Research
  • Teaching
  • CV

    Hi, welcome to my website!

    I am a 3rd-year PhD student in Economics at Michigan State University. My research interests are in development and spatial economics. More specifically, I am interested in temporary and permanent migration in the developing world.

    I received my master’s degree from Peking University and my undergraduate degree from the University of Navarra.

    You can find my CV here.
